ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil profile */,
  "area_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "map_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the map unit */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date and time when the profile was added */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the area */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* General type of soil in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the profile was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horizons" (
  "horizon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horizon */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the soil profile */,
  "horizon_name" TEXT /* Name of the horizon */,
  "depth_start" REAL /* Starting depth of the horizon in inches */,
  "depth_end" REAL /* Ending depth of the horizon in inches */,
  "organic_matter_low" INTEGER /* Low range of organic matter content */,
  "organic_matter_rv" INTEGER /* Representative value of organic matter content */,
  "organic_matter_high" INTEGER /* High range of organic matter content */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil in the horizon */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the soil in the horizon */,
  "cation_exchange_capacity" REAL /* Cation exchange capacity (CEC) of the soil in the horizon */,
  "bulk_density" REAL /* Bulk density of the soil in the horizon */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil in the horizon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horizon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horizons_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES soil_profiles ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "horizon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the soil horizon */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the component in the horizon */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the component */,
  "chemical_composition" TEXT /* Brief description of the chemical composition of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_horizon_id FOREIGN KEY ("horizon_id") REFERENCES horizons ("horizon_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each soil profile
Symbol representing the area
Name of the area
